narrative:
Sycamore C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,452 registered voters, with 61.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
